flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Minnesota-Crookston fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (42.5% → 37.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Minnesota-Crookston fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (56.0% → 49.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Minnesota-Crookston fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Minnesota-Crookston rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (69.7% → 80.0%).
